extension.name: CiviKitchen Joomla Identity Sync
extension.description: On Joomla, load the Joomla session identity matching the authx-authenticated CiviCRM user, so permission checks (which CRM_Core_Permission_Joomla resolves from Joomla's own identity) work for cv --user and api_key requests.
extension.comments: Shipped with the civikitchen Joomla images.
